mnemonics.title: Bayes' Theorem Components
mnemonics.content: Please (Posterior) Let (Likelihood) Priors (Prior) Eat (Evidence) - P(C|X) = [P(X|C) × P(C)] / P(X)

mnemonics.title: Smoothing Purpose
mnemonics.content: Zero Problems? Add One! - Remember Laplace smoothing adds 1 to all counts to avoid zero probabilities.
